## What changed

Describe the user task and the gap this PR closes.

## Evidence

- [ ] The skill or script was exercised on a realistic task.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has positive and negative eval coverage.
- [ ] All referenced files exist and all bundled scripts were tested.
- [ ] Methodological claims cite authoritative sources where appropriate.
- [ ] No benchmark, compatibility, or case-study claim is unsupported.

## Verification

Paste the validation and test commands you ran, plus their results.

## Safety and compatibility

State network access, credentials, dependencies, supported runtimes, data
sensitivity, and any destructive or expensive operations.
